title: GPA Calculator - Grade Point Average
description: Free GPA calculator. Calculate your cumulative grade point average. Supports 4.0 scale, weighted and unweighted GPA. Perfect for college students.
keywords: GPA calculator, grade point average calculator, college GPA, cumulative GPA, 4.0 scale calculator
intro: Calculate your GPA on a 4.0 scale. Add your courses with grades and credit hours to get your cumulative GPA.

faq.a: GPA = Total Grade Points / Total Credit Hours. Each course's grade points = grade value × credit hours.
3.5-4.0 is excellent (Dean's List), 3.0-3.5 is good, 2.5-3.0 is average, below 2.0 may be academic probation.
